Endless Love (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,438,250Details
International Box Office $11,279,923
Worldwide Box Office $34,718,173
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,314,652
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,336,695
Total $5,651,347
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of a privileged girl and a charismatic boy whose instant desire sparks a love affair made only more reckless by parents trying to keep them apart.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,307,125 (56.8% of total gross)
Legs:1.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,896 opening theaters/2,896 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,311,075

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2014 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: May 27th, 2014 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, brief partial nudity, some language and teen partying.
(Rating bulletin 2307, 1/29/2014)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Coming of Age, Dysfunctional Family, Mental Illness, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Bluegrass Films, Fake Empire
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
